---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for httix
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are facing. What are you trying to accomplish that httix currently does not support?

## Proposed Solution

A description of the feature or enhancement you would like to see added. Include any API design ideas, usage examples, or expected behavior.

```ts
// Example usage of the proposed feature
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried. Why do they not fully solve your problem?

## Additional Context

Any other context that would help evaluate the request, such as links to relevant discussions, prior art in other libraries, or use cases.
